# Prompt ID
USR-D02-imggen-flux2

# Domain / Category
D — AI & Prompt Workflows / D02 Image Prompt Generation

# Description
Generate an image prompt for FLUX.2.

# Prompt
Generate a FLUX.2 image of {{idea}} with {{aspect}} framing.

# Parameters
- idea
  - Description: The visual concept to generate.
- aspect
  - Description: Desired aspect ratio.

# Example Values
idea:
- "a vintage motorcycle on cobblestones"

aspect:
- 3:2
- 16:9

# Notes
- Recommended system prompt: `SYS-D02-image-prompt-generation`.
- META

# Keywords
image generation, flux2, meta-prompt, D02
